name: reppy
documentation:
Replaces the built-in robotsparser with a
RFC-conformant implementation that supports modern robots.txt constructs like
Sitemaps, Allow, and Crawl-delay. Main features:

- Memoization of fetched robots.txt
- Expiration taken from the `Expires` header
- Batch queries
- Configurable user agent for fetching robots.txt
- Automatic refetching based on expiration

classes.name: reppy.exceptions.ReppyException
documentation: Any internal exception

classes.name: reppy.exceptions.ContentTooLong
documentation: Robots.txt content is too long.

classes.name: reppy.exceptions.ServerError
documentation: When the remote server returns an error

classes.name: reppy.exceptions.SSLException
documentation: An SSL error.

classes.name: reppy.exceptions.ConnectionException
documentation: A connection error exception.

classes.name: reppy.exceptions.MalformedUrl
documentation: An exception for a missing or invalid url or schema.

classes.name: reppy.exceptions.ExcessiveRedirects
documentation: A TooManyRedirects error.

classes.name: reppy.exceptions.ReadTimeout
documentation: A ReadTimeout error from the HTTP library.

classes.name: reppy.exceptions.BadStatusCode
documentation: An exception for 5xx status codes.

modules.name: reppy.ttl
documentation: Policies for setting the TTL on Robots objects.

classes.name: reppy.ttl.TTLPolicyBase

methods.name: reppy.ttl.TTLPolicyBase.ttl
documentation: Get the caching TTL for a response.

methods.name: reppy.ttl.TTLPolicyBase.expires
documentation: Determine when a response should expire.
Policy for setting the TTL on Robots objects.

classes.name: reppy.ttl.HeaderWithDefaultPolicy

methods.name: reppy.ttl.HeaderWithDefaultPolicy.ttl
documentation: Get the ttl from headers.
TTL is based on headers, but falls back to a default, clamps to a minimum.

modules.name: reppy.util
documentation: Utility functions.

functions.name: reppy.util.parse_date
documentation: Return a timestamp for the provided datestring, described by RFC 7231.

modules.name: reppy
documentation: Robots.txt parsing.

modules.name: reppy.cache.policy
documentation: Policies for caching.

classes.name: reppy.cache.policy.CachePolicyBase

methods.name: reppy.cache.policy.CachePolicyBase.exception
documentation: What to return when there's an exception.
Policy for caching.

classes.name: reppy.cache.policy.DefaultObjectPolicy

methods.name: reppy.cache.policy.DefaultObjectPolicy.exception
documentation: What to return when there's an exception.
Return a default object on exception.

classes.name: reppy.cache.policy.ReraiseExceptionPolicy

methods.name: reppy.cache.policy.ReraiseExceptionPolicy.exception
documentation: What to return when there's an exception.
Reraise the exception.

modules.name: reppy.cache
documentation: A robots.txt cache.

classes.name: reppy.cache.ExpiringObject

methods.name: reppy.cache.ExpiringObject.get
documentation: Get the wrapped object.
Wrap an object that expires over time.

classes.name: reppy.cache.BaseCache

methods.name: reppy.cache.BaseCache.get
documentation: Get the entity that corresponds to URL.

methods.name: reppy.cache.BaseCache.factory
documentation:
Return (expiration, obj) corresponding to provided url, exercising the
cache_policy as necessary.

methods.name: reppy.cache.BaseCache.fetch
documentation: Return (expiration, obj) corresponding to provided url.
A base cache class.

classes.name: reppy.cache.RobotsCache

methods.name: reppy.cache.RobotsCache.allowed
documentation: Return true if the provided URL is allowed to agent.

methods.name: reppy.cache.RobotsCache.fetch
documentation: Return (expiration, Robots) for the robots.txt at the provided URL.
A cache of Robots objects.

classes.name: reppy.cache.AgentCache

methods.name: reppy.cache.AgentCache.allowed
documentation: Return true if the provided URL is allowed to self.agent.

methods.name: reppy.cache.AgentCache.fetch
documentation: Return (expiration, Agent) for the robots.txt at the provided URL.
A cache of Agent objects.
